name: USA Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: USA Pawn & Jewelry offers pawn loans, gold buying, retail merchandise, and flexible payment options at their Phoenix location on North 16th Street.
description_long:
USA Pawn & Jewelry operates as a pawn shop located at 3046 North 16th Street in Phoenix, Arizona. The store is part of the EZPAWN family of stores and serves the Phoenix community as a collateral-based lending provider and second-hand retailer.

The company offers multiple revenue streams: pawn loans (bring items of value for instant cash), gold and diamond jewelry buying (with expert testing and fair pricing), retail merchandise sales (25-70% off retail on pre-owned brand-name items), firearms sales, auto loans, and layaway/flexible payment options. They stock electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming items, musical gear, handbags, sneakers, and other personal property. Customers can get instant quotes for electronics online, and the store receives new inventory daily.

USA Pawn & Jewelry distinguishes itself through the EZ+ Rewards Program (earning points on pawn, redemption, and purchase transactions), product protection plans for electronics and jewelry, a Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts, and multiple payment flexibility options including traditional layaway (10% down, monthly payments) and third-party financing partnerships for up to 12+ months. They emphasize quick service, fair pricing, and community commitment.

As a pawn shop, this business is best suited for consumers needing immediate cash against collateral, individuals looking to buy discounted pre-owned goods, or those seeking to sell jewelry and precious metals. The main limitation is that pawn loans are subject to fees and terms, online payments are not available in Arizona (despite being headquartered there), and not all services are available in all areas.
address: 5259 W Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85031

company_info.headquarters: 5259 W Indian School Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85031

pros: Instant online quotes available for electronics to get estimated value before visiting
EZ+ Rewards Program allows earning points on eligible pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions
Jewelry VIP Program offers guaranteed future loan amounts and 100% trade-up values on jewelry
Expert gold and diamond testing to ensure fair and accurate pricing on precious metals
Daily inventory updates with thousands of pre-owned brand-name items at 25-70% discounts
Multiple payment flexibility options including layaway (10% down) and third-party financing up to 12+ months
Product protection plans available for electronics and other merchandise purchases
cons: Pawn transactions subject to unspecified fees and terms not detailed on website
Online payment capability explicitly not offered in Arizona despite store location there
Not all services available in all areas, limiting service scope for some customers
No APR or interest rate information disclosed for pawn loans or financing options
Layaway requires 10% down payment upfront, creating initial cash barrier
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash against collateral (jewelry, electronics, tools, firearms)
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking 25-70% discounts on pre-owned brand-name electronics and goods
Individuals with jewelry or precious metals to sell for fair market value
Buyers seeking flexible payment options through layaway or extended financing
diagnosis: USA Pawn & Jewelry is best for Phoenix-area consumers who own items of value and need immediate cash, or bargain hunters seeking discounted pre-owned electronics and merchandise. The primary caveat is that pawn loan terms, fees, and interest rates are not disclosed online, and online payment capability—a modern convenience—is specifically unavailable in Arizona where this store operates.
services: Pawn loans on items in decent working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying with expert testing
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payments
Third-party flexible payment financing (up to 12+ months)
EZ+ Rewards Program with point accumulation
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up value
Product protection plans for electronics and merchandise
Online shop with daily new arrivals
